metadata.description: Bug investigation pipeline: reproduce → root cause analysis → implement fix → regression test → review → PR

phases.name: Reproduction
phases.description: Reproduce the bug and gather evidence

steps.title: Clarify and document bug report
steps.description: Review the bug report. If it's vague, use needs_clarification to ask for: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, error messages, environment details. Document the bug clearly.

steps.title: Reproduce the bug
steps.description: Use shell to run the code and reproduce the bug. Check logs. Run existing tests to see which fail. Document exact reproduction steps and error output.

steps.title: Root cause analysis
steps.description: Read the relevant source files. Trace the code path that leads to the bug. Identify the specific line(s) causing the issue. Explain the root cause clearly.

steps.title: Implement the fix
steps.description: Based on root cause analysis, implement the fix. Make minimal, targeted changes. Add inline comments explaining why the fix works. Run lint after changes.

steps.title: Add regression test
steps.description: Write a test that would have caught this bug. The test should fail before the fix and pass after. Add it to the appropriate test file.

steps.title: Verify the fix and run tests
steps.description: Run the full test suite. Verify the original bug is fixed. Check that no regressions were introduced. Report test results.
